title: WELLMAIL
subtitle: An e-mail client with GUI written in Python
summary: My first serious software project. It was a course project finished with a group of three. We built a Python e-mail client with a GUI, and spent a lot of time figuring out how to make SMTP and QT work.

blocks.text: It's a tiny project, almost useless in that sense, but I really enjoyed it. We spent most of the time trying to get the UI work, which seems dumb to try to use QT to write a UI in Python rather than just pull up a localhost and write a web frontend.
